title: 「Different X of」句型
titleEn: Using different kinds, sorts, types and forms of

omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Different + kinds / sorts / types / forms + of + noun + verb + other information

formulas.formula: Different + kinds / sorts / types / forms + of + noun + verb + other information
Subject + verb + different + kinds / sorts / types / forms + of + noun

example: Different forms of fashion reflect age or status.
exampleZh: 不同形式的時尚反映年齡或身分。

examples.en: Different forms of fashion reflect age or status.
examples.zh: 不同形式的時尚反映年齡或身分。

examples.en: This shop has different sorts of snacks.
examples.zh: 這間店有不同種類的小食。

examples.en: This restaurant has different kinds of dishes.
examples.zh: 這間餐廳有不同種類的菜式。

meaning.zh: X 可以是 kinds、sorts、types 或 forms；這個結構表示某類事物包含多個種類、類別或形式。

rules.zh: 由於 different 表示多於一個種類，X 通常使用複數形式：different kinds / sorts / types / forms of。
rules.en: Because different refers to more than one category, X normally takes the plural form: different kinds / sorts / types / forms of.
examples: Different kinds of books are available.

rules.zh: Of 後面可以接複數可數名詞；在本練習中，可數名詞一般使用複數形式。
rules.en: A plural countable noun may follow of; in this exercise, countable nouns normally use the plural form.

rules.zh: Of 後面亦可以接不可數名詞；不可數名詞不需要加 -s。
rules.en: An uncountable noun may also follow of and does not take -s.

rules.zh: Kinds 和 types 適用於一般種類；sorts 在英式日常表達中常見；forms 常表示較抽象事物存在、出現或表達的不同形式。並非每題都可隨意交換四個字。
rules.en: Kinds and types cover general categories; sorts is common in everyday British English; forms often describes ways in which abstract things exist, appear or are expressed. The four words are not freely interchangeable in every sentence.

rules.zh: 真正的主語是複數的 kinds、sorts、types 或 forms，所以動詞要與這個複數主語一致。
rules.en: The true subject is the plural kinds, sorts, types or forms, so the verb must agree with that plural subject.
examples: Different kinds of food are available.

rules.zh: Different books 表示不同的個別書籍；different kinds of books 表示不同類別的書籍。
rules.en: Different books means separate individual books; different kinds of books means different categories of books.

rules.zh: 本練習集中使用 different kinds / sorts / types / forms of 的複數結構，不以 a different kind/type of 或 another form of 為主要目標。
rules.en: This exercise focuses on the plural structure different kinds / sorts / types / forms of rather than singular patterns such as a different kind/type of or another form of.

rules.zh: 部分句子可自然使用多於一個分類詞；參考答案提供其中一個文法正確、用字自然並保留原意的建議答案。
rules.en: Some sentences naturally allow more than one category word; the key supplies one suggested answer that is grammatical, natural and preserves the original meaning.
examples: The shop sells different kinds of bread.
The shop sells different types of bread.

benefits.zh: 這個句型不只是表示數量多，而是清楚說明事物可分成不同類別。
benefits.en: This structure does more than express quantity; it clearly shows that things belong to different categories.

benefits.zh: 當具體例子並不重要時，可以把它們歸納成不同種類，不必逐一列出。
benefits.en: When individual examples are unimportant, you can group them into categories instead of listing every item.

benefits.zh: 加入目標句型能令概括句更準確，表明各人的選擇或事物的形式並不完全相同。
benefits.en: Adding the target structure makes a general statement more precise by showing variation in choices or forms.

benefits.zh: 這個句型適合先介紹類別，再比較它們的用途、特點或影響。
benefits.en: The structure helps introduce categories before comparing their uses, features or effects.

benefits.zh: 可以根據意思選用 kinds、sorts、types 或 forms，增加句式和用字變化。
benefits.en: Choosing among kinds, sorts, types and forms adds structural and lexical variety.

benefits.zh: There are different kinds of…、We use different types of… 等框架能幫助更快組織口語答案。
benefits.en: Frames such as There are different kinds of… and We use different types of… help organise spoken answers quickly.

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using different + kinds / sorts / types / forms + of.
Choose the category word that best matches the meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 different + kinds / sorts / types / forms + of 改寫以下句子。
請選擇最符合句意的分類詞。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The small shop sells a variety of snacks.
questions.promptZh: 這間小店售賣多種小食。
questions.answer: The small shop sells different kinds of snacks.
questions.answerZh: 這間小店售賣不同種類的小食。
questions.highlight: The small shop sells different kinds of snacks.

questions.prompt: Our library has books from several categories.
questions.promptZh: 我們的圖書館藏有幾個類別的書籍。
questions.answer: Our library has different types of books.
questions.answerZh: 我們的圖書館藏有不同類型的書籍。
questions.highlight: Our library has different types of books.

questions.prompt: What does the café serve? It serves several varieties of drinks.
questions.promptZh: 這間咖啡店供應甚麼？它供應多種飲品。
questions.answer: The café serves different sorts of drinks.
questions.answerZh: 這間咖啡店供應不同種類的飲品。
questions.highlight: The café serves different sorts of drinks.

questions.prompt: Several ways of travelling are available here.
questions.promptZh: 這裏有幾種出行方式可供選擇。
questions.answer: Different forms of transport are available here.
questions.answerZh: 這裏有不同的交通方式可供選擇。
questions.highlight: Different forms of transport are available here.

questions.prompt: Mia enjoys music in many styles.
questions.promptZh: 米婭喜歡多種風格的音樂。
questions.answer: Mia enjoys different kinds of music.
questions.answerZh: 米婭喜歡不同種類的音樂。
questions.highlight: Mia enjoys different kinds of music.

questions.prompt: The market sells several varieties of fruit.
questions.promptZh: 市場售賣多個品種的水果。
questions.answer: The market sells different types of fruit.
questions.answerZh: 市場售賣不同類型的水果。
questions.highlight: The market sells different types of fruit.

questions.prompt: At the party, we tried a range of games.
questions.promptZh: 在派對上，我們玩了多種遊戲。
questions.answer: We tried different sorts of games at the party.
questions.answerZh: 我們在派對上玩了不同種類的遊戲。
questions.highlight: We tried different sorts of games at the party.

questions.promptZh: 多種運動方式令課堂保持有趣。
questions.answer: Different forms of exercise keep the class interesting.
questions.answerZh: 不同形式的運動令課堂保持有趣。
questions.highlight: Different forms of exercise keep the class interesting.

questions.prompt: What does the museum display? It displays paintings in many styles.
questions.promptZh: 博物館展出甚麼？它展出多種風格的畫作。
questions.answer: The museum displays different kinds of paintings.
questions.answerZh: 博物館展出不同種類的畫作。
questions.highlight: The museum displays different kinds of paintings.

questions.prompt: Students use pens from several categories in art class.
questions.promptZh: 學生在美術課使用幾種類型的筆。
questions.answer: Students use different types of pens in art class.
questions.answerZh: 學生在美術課使用不同類型的筆。
questions.highlight: Students use different types of pens in art class.

questions.prompt: The school canteen offers a wide variety of meals.
questions.promptZh: 學校飯堂提供多種餐點。
questions.answer: The school canteen offers different kinds of meals.
questions.answerZh: 學校飯堂提供不同種類的餐點。
questions.highlight: The school canteen offers different kinds of meals.

questions.prompt: There are many varieties of flowers in the garden.
questions.promptZh: 花園裏有多個品種的花。
questions.answer: The garden contains different sorts of flowers.
questions.answerZh: 花園裏有不同種類的花。
questions.highlight: The garden contains different sorts of flowers.

questions.prompt: Various weather conditions require different clothes.
questions.promptZh: 不同的天氣情況需要不同的衣物。
questions.answer: Different types of weather require different clothes.
questions.answerZh: 不同類型的天氣需要不同的衣物。
questions.highlight: Different types of weather require different clothes.

questions.promptZh: 老師在課堂中使用了幾種練習方法。
questions.answer: Our teacher used different forms of practice during the lesson.

questions.highlight: Our teacher used different forms of practice during the lesson.

questions.highlight: The children made different types of models from recycled materials.

questions.promptZh: 能源有多種形式，並可用來為住宅供能。
questions.answer: Different forms of energy can power homes.

questions.prompt: Different reading skills are tested by questions from several categories.
questions.promptZh: 幾個類別的題目會測試不同的閱讀能力。

questions.highlight: Different kinds of questions test different reading skills.

questions.prompt: What can students do after school? The club offers a wide range of activities.
questions.promptZh: 學生放學後可以做甚麼？該社團提供多種活動。
questions.answer: The club offers different sorts of activities after school.
questions.answerZh: 該社團在放學後提供不同種類的活動。
questions.highlight: The club offers different sorts of activities after school.

questions.prompt: Why do people choose among several ways of paying?
questions.promptZh: 為甚麼人們會從多種付款方法中作出選擇？
questions.answer: Why do people choose different forms of payment?
questions.answerZh: 為甚麼人們會選擇不同的付款方式？
questions.highlight: Why do people choose different forms of payment?

questions.prompt: The report compares several categories of public transport.
questions.promptZh: 報告比較幾個類別的公共交通工具。
questions.answer: The report compares different types of public transport.
questions.answerZh: 報告比較不同類型的公共交通工具。
questions.highlight: The report compares different types of public transport.

questions.prompt: Several categories of medicine must be stored carefully.
questions.promptZh: 幾個類別的藥物都必須小心存放。
questions.answer: Different kinds of medicine must be stored carefully.

questions.highlight: Different kinds of medicine must be stored carefully.

questions.prompt: The app lets users create several chart types.

questions.prompt: Problems are not all the same. They may therefore need different solutions.
questions.promptZh: 問題並非全部相同，因此可能需要不同的解決方法。
questions.answer: Different sorts of problems may require different solutions.
questions.answerZh: 不同種類的問題可能需要不同的解決方法。
questions.highlight: Different sorts of problems may require different solutions.

questions.prompt: In its exhibition, the science centre shows light appearing in several forms.
questions.promptZh: 科學中心在展覽中展示以多種形式出現的光。
questions.answer: The science centre shows different forms of light in its exhibition.
questions.answerZh: 科學中心在展覽中展示不同形式的光。
questions.highlight: The science centre shows different forms of light in its exhibition.

questions.prompt: Waste from separate categories should be placed in separate bins.

questions.answer: Different types of waste should be placed in separate bins.

questions.highlight: Different types of waste should be placed in separate bins.

questions.prompt: Before making a decision, our team considered a range of plans.
questions.promptZh: 在作出決定前，我們的團隊考慮了多個方案。
questions.answer: Our team considered different kinds of plans before making a decision.
questions.answerZh: 我們的團隊在作出決定前考慮了不同種類的方案。
questions.highlight: Our team considered different kinds of plans before making a decision.

questions.promptZh: 老師解釋，寫作有多種形式，而每種形式都有本身的目的。
questions.answer: The teacher explained that different forms of writing have different purposes.
questions.answerZh: 老師解釋，不同形式的寫作有不同的目的。
questions.highlight: The teacher explained that different forms of writing have different purposes.

questions.prompt: Customers are not all alike and may expect different levels of service.
questions.promptZh: 顧客並非全部相同，並可能期望不同水平的服務。
questions.answer: Different sorts of customers may expect different levels of service.
questions.answerZh: 不同種類的顧客可能期望不同水平的服務。
questions.highlight: Different sorts of customers may expect different levels of service.

questions.prompt: What does the course introduce? It introduces several categories of jobs in the health sector.
questions.promptZh: 該課程介紹甚麼？它介紹醫療界幾個類別的工作。
questions.answer: The course introduces different types of jobs in the health sector.
questions.answerZh: 該課程介紹醫療界不同類型的工作。
questions.highlight: The course introduces different types of jobs in the health sector.

questions.answer: Different forms of exercise affect the body in different ways.

questions.highlight: Different forms of exercise affect the body in different ways.

questions.highlight: The council is testing different kinds of signs to improve road safety.

questions.prompt: Not all information should be shared in the same way because it belongs to separate categories.
questions.promptZh: 並非所有資料都應以相同方式分享，因為它們屬於不同類別。

questions.promptZh: 為了配搭主菜，廚師準備了多種醬汁。

questions.prompt: Workplace performance can be affected by several forms of stress. The research team examined them.
questions.promptZh: 工作表現可能受到多種形式的壓力影響。研究團隊研究了這些壓力。

questions.prompt: What should researchers do before reaching a conclusion? They should examine evidence from several categories.
questions.promptZh: 研究人員在得出結論前應該做甚麼？他們應檢視幾個類別的證據。
questions.answer: Researchers should examine different types of evidence before reaching a conclusion.
questions.answerZh: 研究人員在得出結論前，應檢視不同類型的證據。
questions.highlight: Researchers should examine different types of evidence before reaching a conclusion.

questions.promptZh: 為了減少貨物在運送期間受損，公司測試了多種包裝。

questions.highlight: The company tested different kinds of packaging to reduce damage during delivery.

questions.prompt: Online learning takes several forms and gives students several ways to participate.

questions.answer: Different forms of online learning give students different ways to participate.

questions.highlight: Different forms of online learning give students different ways to participate.

questions.prompt: Public spaces from several categories are used by the city to meet residents’ needs.
questions.promptZh: 城市利用幾個類別的公共空間來滿足居民的需要。
questions.answer: The city uses different types of public spaces to meet residents’ needs.

questions.highlight: The city uses different types of public spaces to meet residents’ needs.

questions.prompt: Decisions are not all alike. Their requirements for time, evidence and discussion differ.
questions.promptZh: 決定並非全部相同；它們對時間、證據和討論的要求各有不同。
questions.answer: Different sorts of decisions have different requirements for time, evidence and discussion.
questions.answerZh: 不同種類的決定對時間、證據和討論有不同要求。
questions.highlight: Different sorts of decisions have different requirements for time, evidence and discussion.
